source_discovery_method: fetch public board HTML and parse validated cards/links only
list_fetch_method: bounded HTML list fetch through source runner
detail_fetch_method: not currently enabled; use only future fixture-backed detail extractors
pagination_method: only follow known next-page/list links with max-page and max-row limits
canonical_url_rule: use source canonical/apply URL, absolutize relative URLs, strip tracking noise, and keep stable path identity
source_job_id_rule: source id is the stable path segment after /jobs/{id}/detail or /leads/{id}/detail
title_company_rule: reject rows missing title, company context, or usable canonical/apply URL; reject placeholders and blank titles
location_text_rule: use source card subtitle only; do not infer missing location from body/title text
country_region_city_rule: normalize from source card subtitle when deterministic; otherwise leave blank/null
remote_type_rule: use explicit remote/hybrid card title or subtitle text; source-backed location without remote/hybrid stays onsite
posting_date_rule: Simplicant public list fixture has no posting-date evidence; leave null unless future source-backed field is added
rate_limit: strict host serialization, jitter, retry cap, and high block-rate stop

quality_threshold.public_write_rule: public writes require source_job_id plus title/company/canonical URL and geo or explicit remote/hybrid evidence

runner_interface.discover: fetch public board HTML and parse validated cards/links only
runner_interface.fetchList: bounded HTML list fetch through source runner
runner_interface.fetchDetail: not currently enabled; list card evidence only
runner_interface.writeAccepted: source runner accepted path updates public read model only after validation
runner_interface.writeQuarantine: source runner quarantine path records reason and keeps row out of public index

next_action: monitor with parser stats and live field-quality audit after deploy/source refresh
